user.title: JBL MA Series AVR
user.description: Enter the IP address of your AVR. IP control must be enabled (the AVR must not be in Green standby mode).

zeroconf_confirm.title: JBL MA Series AVR discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: Discovered {name} at {host}. Add it to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the AVR.
error.timeout: Timed out waiting for the AVR to respond.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the AVR's IP control port.
abort.not_jbl_ma: Discovered device doesn't look like a JBL MA series AVR.

send_ir.name: Send IR command
send_ir.description: Simulate a remote-control IR command on the AVR.

code.name: Code
code.description: Named IR action or 24-bit NEC code.

send_raw.name: Send raw command
send_raw.description: Send any command id with data bytes.
